'''dangosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drabette|drabette]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drabette|drabette]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dangosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dængesheth|dængesheth]] || [[word:dængeshej|dængeshej]] || [[word:dængeshesh|dængeshesh]] || [[word:dængeshe|dængeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dangongoshoth|dangongoshoth]] || [[word:dangongoshoj|dangongoshoj]] || [[word:dangongoshosh|dangongoshosh]] || [[word:dangongosho|dangongosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dangoshoth|dangoshoth]] || [[word:dangoshoj|dangoshoj]] || [[word:dangoshosh|dangoshosh]] || [[word:dangosho|dangosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dangofshoth|dangofshoth]] || [[word:dangofshoj|dangofshoj]] || [[word:dangofshosh|dangofshosh]] || [[word:dangofshof|dangofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dangoshotho|dangoshotho]] || [[word:dangoshojo|dangoshojo]] || [[word:dangoshosho|dangoshosho]] || [[word:dangoshoko|dangoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dangoshoth|dangoshoth]] || [[word:dangoshoj|dangoshoj]] || [[word:dangoshosh|dangoshosh]] || [[word:dangosho|dangosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dangoshothol|dangoshothol]] || [[word:dangoshojol|dangoshojol]] || [[word:dangoshoshol|dangoshoshol]] || [[word:dangoshokol|dangoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dangoshothotho|dangoshothotho]] || [[word:dangoshojojo|dangoshojojo]] || [[word:dangoshoshosho|dangoshoshosho]] || [[word:dangoshoko|dangoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dangoshothon|dangoshothon]] || [[word:dangoshojon|dangoshojon]] || [[word:dangoshoshon|dangoshoshon]] || [[word:dangoshokon|dangoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dangoshothoro|dangoshothoro]] || [[word:dangoshojoro|dangoshojoro]] || [[word:dangoshoshoro|dangoshoshoro]] || [[word:dangoshokoro|dangoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
